name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Webhooks
description: Verify that repository webhooks use authentication tokens (secrets) to validate incoming payloads. Unauthenticated webhooks allow attackers to forge events, trigger CI pipelines with malicious input, or exfiltrate data through spoofed callback URLs.
match: repository webhooks configured without a secret token for payload validation
replacement: add a secret token to each webhook and validate HMAC-SHA256 signatures on the receiving end
